---
title: "Working Code Document"
author: "Group 7"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Data Wrangling

```{r data_wrangling}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(readr)
library(ggdag)
load(file='obesity.Rda')

other_outcomes <- c("diabetes", "MI", "angina", "stroke", "death") 

# Data wrangling: remove unused outcomes + rows with NAs
data <- obesity %>%
  select(!other_outcomes) %>%
  na.omit()

# Mutate to binary 
obesity <- data %>%
  mutate(medhyper = case_when(
    medhyper == "no" ~ 0,
    medhyper == "yes" ~ 1,),
    CVD = case_when(
      CVD == "No" ~ 0,
      CVD == "Yes" ~ 1,))

## Transform variables 
# Adiposity
plot(obesity$bmi, obesity$waist)
adiposity_model <- lm(bmi ~ waist, data = obesity)
summary(adiposity_model)

obesity$adiposity <- scale(obesity$bmi) + scale(obesity$waist)

# BP
plot(obesity$SYSBP, obesity$DIABP)
bp_model <- lm(SYSBP ~ DIABP, data = obesity)
summary(bp_model)

obesity$MAP <- (obesity$SYSBP + 2*obesity$DIABP)/3

# Alcohol 
obesity$alcohol <- case_when(obesity$alcohol > 5 ~ 6,
          obesity$alcohol == 5 ~ 5,
          obesity$alcohol == 4 ~ 4,
          obesity$alcohol == 3 ~ 3,
          obesity$alcohol == 2 ~ 2,
          obesity$alcohol == 1 ~ 1,
          obesity$alcohol == 0 ~ 0) 

# Look if populations are comparable for pre-treatment covariates
## Age
p1 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = age, fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


## Sex
p2 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = factor(sex), fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


## Adiposity 
p3 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = adiposity, fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


## BP
p4 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = MAP, fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

## Smoking
p5 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = factor(current.smoking), fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

## Alcohol
p6 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = factor(alcohol), fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

## Statins
p7 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = factor(medstatin), fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

## Glucose
p8 <- ggplot(obesity, aes(x = factor(medglucose), fill = factor(medhyper))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6,p7,p8,nrow = 4)
```

## DAG
```{r dag}
obesity_dag <- dagify(
  adiposity ~ age + sex, 
  medglucose ~ age + sex + adiposity, 
  BP ~ age + sex + adiposity + medglucose + smoking + alcohol, 
  medhyper ~ BP,
  CVD ~ age + sex + smoking + alcohol + adiposity + BP + medhyper + medglucose,
  coords = time_ordered_coords(
    list(
      # time point 1
      c("age", "sex"),
      # time point 2
      c("smoking","alcohol"),
      # time point 3
      c("adiposity"),
      # time point 4
      c("medglucose", "BP"),
      # time point 5
      c("medhyper"),
      # time point 6
      c("CVD")
    )
  ),
  exposure = "medhyper",
  outcome = "CVD",
  labels = c(
    CVD = "CVD",
    medhyper = "medhyper",
    medglucose = "diabetes",
    age = "age",
    sex = "sex",
    smoking = 'smoking', 
    adiposity = 'adiposity',
    alcohol = "alcohol",
    BP = "BP"
  )
)
ggdag(obesity_dag, use_labels = "label", text = FALSE) +
  theme_dag()

obesity_dag_tidy <- obesity_dag %>%
  tidy_dagitty()

obesity_dag_tidy


obesity_dag_tidy %>%
  dag_paths() %>%
  filter(set == 2, path == "open path")

library(dagitty)
obesity_dag_tidy %>%
  pull_dag() %>%
  paths()



ggdag_adjustment_set(
  obesity_dag,
  text = FALSE,
  use_labels = "label"
)

adjustmentSets(obesity_dag, type = "canonical")

obesity_dag %>% adjustmentSets()
```

# Identifying confounders

## T-tests
```{r t-tests}
t.test(obesity$age ~ obesity$medhyper) #significant
t.test(obesity$adiposity ~ obesity$medhyper) #significant
t.test(obesity$MAP ~ obesity$medhyper) #significant
```

## Chi square 
```{r chi square}
chisq.test(obesity$sex, obesity$medhyper) #significant 
chisq.test(obesity$current.smoking, obesity$medhyper) #not significant 
chisq.test(obesity$alcohol, obesity$medhyper) #significant 
chisq.test(obesity$medstatin, obesity$medhyper) #significant
chisq.test(obesity$medglucose, obesity$medhyper) #significant 
```



# Outcome regression
```{r outcome_regression}
glm = glm(CVD ~ medhyper + 
            age + medhyper*age +
            sex + medhyper*sex +
            adiposity + medhyper*adiposity + 
            MAP + medhyper*MAP +
            current.smoking + medhyper*current.smoking +
            alcohol + current.smoking*alcohol +
            medstatin +  medhyper*medstatin +
            medglucose + medhyper*medglucose, 
          data = obesity, family = binomial)
summary(glm)
```


# G-formula
## Step 1
```{r g-formula}
g_model = glm(CVD ~ medhyper + 
            age + medhyper*age +
            sex + medhyper*sex +
            adiposity + medhyper*adiposity + 
            MAP + medhyper*MAP +
            current.smoking + medhyper*current.smoking +
            alcohol + current.smoking*alcohol +
            medstatin +  medhyper*medstatin +
            medglucose + medhyper*medglucose, 
          data = obesity, family = binomial)
summary(g_model)
```

## Step 2
```{r step 2}
obesity1 = obesity
obesity1$medhyper = 1
YE1 = predict(g_model, newdata = obesity1, type="response")
mean_YE1 = mean(YE1, na.rm = T)
```


```{r step 2.5}
obesity0 = obesity
obesity0$medhyper = 0
YE0 = predict(g_model, newdata = obesity0, type="response")
mean_YE0 = mean(YE0, na.rm = T)

```

## Step 3
```{r step 3}
mean_YE1- mean_YE0 #average treatment effect (ATE)

(mean_YE1/(1-mean_YE1))/(mean_YE0/(1-mean_YE0)) #causal odds ratio
```


# Bootstrap to get the CI
```{r bootstrap}
set.seed(123)
B = 1000
ATE_boot = numeric(B)
OR_boot  = numeric(B)

n = nrow(obesity)

for (b in 1:B) {

  #Resample data
  index = sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE) 
  data_b = obesity[index, ] 

  #Refit model
  g_model_b = glm(CVD ~ medhyper + 
            age + medhyper*age +
            sex + medhyper*sex +
            adiposity + medhyper*adiposity + 
            MAP + medhyper*MAP +
            current.smoking + medhyper*current.smoking +
            alcohol + current.smoking*alcohol +
            medstatin +  medhyper*medstatin +
            medglucose + medhyper*medglucose, 
          data = data_b, family = binomial)

  #Predict medhyper = 1
  data1 = data_b
  data1$medhyper = 1
  p1 = predict(g_model_b, newdata = data1, type="response")
  m1 = mean(p1, na.rm = T)

  #Predict medhyper = 0
  data0 = data_b
  data0$medhyper = 0
  p0 = predict(g_model_b, newdata = data0, type="response")
  m0 = mean(p0, na.rm = T)

  #Store estimands
  ATE_boot[b] = m1 - m0
  OR_boot[b]  = (m1/(1-m1)) / (m0/(1-m0))
}

mean(ATE_boot, na.rm = T)
mean(OR_boot, na.rm = T)

quantile(ATE_boot, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = T)
quantile(OR_boot,  c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = T)
```

## Positivity
```{r positivity}
table(obesity$sex, obesity$medhyper)
table(obesity$current.smoking, obesity$medhyper)
table(obesity$alcohol, obesity$medhyper)
table(obesity$medstatin, obesity$medhyper)
table(obesity$medglucose, obesity$medhyper)
```
## Visualization

```{r visualisation}
par(mfrow=c(1,2)) # Side-by-side plots

# ATE Histogram
hist(ATE_boot, breaks=20, main="Bootstrap ATE", xlab="Risk Difference", col="gray")
abline(v = mean(ATE_boot), col="red", lwd=2)
abline(v = quantile(ATE_boot, c(0.025, 0.975)), col="red", lty=2)

# OR Histogram
hist(OR_boot, breaks=20, main="Bootstrap OR", xlab="Odds Ratio", col="gray")
abline(v = mean(OR_boot), col="red", lwd=2)
abline(v = quantile(OR_boot, c(0.025, 0.975)), col="red", lty=2)
```

```{r summary results}
# Create a summary data frame
results_table <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Average Treatment Effect (ATE)", "Odds Ratio (OR)"),
  Estimate = c(mean(ATE_boot, na.rm = TRUE), mean(OR_boot, na.rm = TRUE)),
  Lower_CI = c(quantile(ATE_boot, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE), quantile(OR_boot, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
  Upper_CI = c(quantile(ATE_boot, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE), quantile(OR_boot, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Format for display
results_table$Formatted <- sprintf("%.3f (95%% CI: %.3f, %.3f)", 
                                   results_table$Estimate, 
                                   results_table$Lower_CI, 
                                   results_table$Upper_CI)

print(results_table[, c("Metric", "Formatted")])
```
